channel.title: Applebees on WithinTrend — Trending Topics & Guides
channel.description: Recent content in Applebees on WithinTrend — Trending Topics & Guides

item.title: Working at Applebee's as a Bartender: Pay, Pros, Cons & What to Expect
item.description: A comprehensive guide to working as a bartender at Applebee's, covering pay, tips, daily tasks, pros, cons, and tips for new hires.

item.title: Working at Applebee's as a Server: Pay, Pros, Cons & What to Expect
item.description: A comprehensive guide to working as an Applebee's server, covering tips, pay, daily responsibilities, and the real pros and cons.
